local_evidence.observed_shape: Claude project JSONL files can contain message.role=user records whose content array contains type=tool_result items.

candidate.problem: text_from_value extracted string content from array items without excluding tool_result blocks.
candidate.risk: Tool outputs could be counted as user-authored prompts, polluting prompt frequency, quality gaps, and repair queues.
candidate.decision: Ignore array items whose type is tool_result before extracting text/content fields.

red.evidence: The new test failed with 2 records instead of the expected 1.

green.evidence: The focused test passed after text_from_value skipped type=tool_result array items.

full_verification.evidence: 10 UI helper tests passed, Vite build passed, 36 Rust library tests passed, 13 CLI tests passed, doc-tests passed, and strict clippy passed.
